scripts.build: npm run build -w @cf7-packer/core && npm run build -w @cf7-packer/cli && npm run build -w @cf7-packer/web
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/cli --pretty false && npm run typecheck --workspace @cf7-packer/web
scripts.pack:dry-run: npm run prebuild:core && tsx packages/cli/src/index.ts pack --dry-run
scripts.pack: npm run prebuild:core && tsx packages/cli/src/index.ts pack
scripts.validate-config: npm run prebuild:core && tsx packages/cli/src/index.ts validate-config
scripts.list-tags: npm run prebuild:core && tsx packages/cli/src/index.ts list-tags
scripts.diff: npm run prebuild:core && tsx packages/cli/src/index.ts diff
